repo.description: Researcher Agent to write blog posts/ articles using Amazon Bedrock and websearch.

terms.context_snippet: Bedrock Deep Research is a Streamlit-based application using Amazon Bedrock, LangGraph, and LangChain AWS libraries that automates article/report generation through AI-powered research, content writing, and image generation.
